basics.name: Jun Huo
basics.label: Research Associate
basics.summary: Research Associate at the Department of Mechanical and Automation Engineering, The Chinese University of Hong Kong. Research interests include flexible medical robots, human-centered wearable rehabilitation assistive robots, supernumerary robotic limbs, exoskeletons, mechanism design, optimization, and learning-based control.

work.company: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
work.summary: Department of Mechanical and Automation Engineering; postdoctoral supervisor: Prof. Shing Shin Cheng.

education.institution: Huazhong University of Science and Technology
education.area: Ph.D. in Control Science and Engineering
